splash.seoTitle: Aurya — the holistic retreats marketplace is about to open
splash.seoDesc: Aurya connects those who create holistic retreats with those seeking them. We're getting ready to launch: leave your email and be among the first.
splash.title: The holistic retreats marketplace is about to open
splash.subtitle: Aurya connects those who craft authentic wellbeing experiences with those looking for them. Choose your path.
splash.travelerText: Tell us what calls to you, and at launch you'll receive retreats chosen for you.
splash.operatorText: Bring your retreats to Aurya: the first on board start as founders.
splash.peek: Take a peek at the retreats preview

banner.title: We're getting ready to launch.
banner.body: These are sample retreats: soon you'll find the real ones here, bookable online.

form.name: Your name
form.trCity: Where do you live? City or area
form.interestsLabel: What calls to you? Feel free to pick more than one path
form.budgetLabel: How much would you like to invest in a retreat?
form.description: Tell us about your work in a couple of lines: what you offer, since when, and for whom.
form.consent: I agree to be contacted by email about the launch of Aurya.
form.ctaOp: I want to be there at launch
form.thanksTr: At launch you'll receive a selection of retreats chosen just for you. See you soon.
form.thanksOp: Thank you for introducing yourself: we'll write to you personally before launch.

op.seoTitle: Aurya for practitioners — you create the experience, we help people find it
op.seoDesc: Aurya is about to open: the Italian marketplace for holistic retreats. Real visibility, bookings with a protected deposit, effortless management. Introduce yourself: the first practitioners start as founders.
op.eyebrow: For those who create wellbeing experiences
op.title: You create the experience. We help people find it.
op.subtitle: You've built something precious: a place, a practice, a community. You deserve to be found by the people who are looking for it, without chasing algorithms. Aurya is about to open: the Italian marketplace for holistic retreats.
op.foundersT: The first on board start as founders.
op.foundersB: Join now and you'll get front-row visibility at launch and reserved conditions. We'll get back to you personally.
op.b1b: Your profile and your retreats, optimized for people searching Google for "yoga retreat near me". You show up where people choose, not where you shout the loudest.
op.b2b: Online booking with a deposit protected by Stripe and automatic reminders: those who sign up actually show up. No-shows stop being the hidden cost of your work.
op.b3b: Calendar, participants, verified reviews and payments, all in one place. The time you used to lose in messages and spreadsheets goes back to the people you guide.
op.ctaTitle: Introduce yourself: let's get to know each other
op.ctaBody: A couple of lines about you and your work. We'll write to you, personally, before launch. No call centers, no spam.

tr.seoTitle: Aurya — there's a retreat out there waiting for you
tr.seoDesc: Aurya is about to open: real holistic retreats from verified practitioners, with a protected deposit. Tell us what you're looking for, and at launch we'll suggest retreats chosen for you.
tr.eyebrow: For those who feel the need to pause
tr.title: There's a retreat out there waiting for you
tr.subtitle: The silence of an olive grove, a circle of real people, your breath slowing down again. Aurya is about to open: tell us what you're looking for and we'll help you find it.
tr.formTitle: Tell us what you're looking for
tr.formBody: Thirty seconds is all it takes. Tell us where you live and what calls to you, and at launch you'll receive a selection of retreats chosen just for you. No avalanche of emails: only what matters.
tr.peek: Sneak a peek at the retreats preview
tr.b1b: Behind every retreat there's a practitioner with a face, a real place, and reviews from people who've actually been there. No anonymous listings.
tr.b2t: Your spot is yours, no anxiety
tr.b2b: Secure it with a deposit protected by Stripe; the balance comes later. Clear rules from the start, no wiring money into the unknown.
tr.b3b: Tell us where you live and we'll suggest experiences within easy reach. Sometimes the journey you need is an hour from home.
tr.why: Aurya was born from a simple belief: taking care of yourself shouldn't take hours of digging through social pages and word of mouth. One single, carefully curated place to find the people who do this work with heart.
